characters.name: John Carter
characters.description: Former Confederate cavalry captain, prospector in Arizona, mysteriously transported to Mars/Barsoom.

characters.name: Captain James K. Powell
characters.description: Carter's fellow prospector and friend, killed by Apaches before Carter's transportation to Mars.

characters.name: Sola
characters.description: A female green Martian assigned to guard Carter, shows unusual kindness among the Tharks.

characters.name: Tars Tarkas
characters.description: A large and important green Martian warrior, one of the leaders of the Tharks.

characters.name: Lorquas Ptomel
characters.description: Jeddak (chief) of the Thark community that captures Carter.

voice_profile.tone: adventure and pulp, earnest and dramatic

settings.name: Arizona territory
settings.description: American Southwest, gold prospecting country, Apache territory.

settings.name: Arizona cave
settings.description: Mysterious cave where Carter takes refuge and experiences his transportation to Mars.

settings.name: Mars/Barsoom landscape
settings.description: Barren, ochre-coloured Martian terrain with low hills and sparse vegetation.

settings.name: Thark incubator
settings.description: Building where green Martian eggs are kept and hatchlings emerge.

plot_threads.thread: Carter's mysterious transportation to Mars and whether he can return to Earth
Carter's survival captivity among green Martians Tharks warrior aliens
Carter's superhuman strength leaping gravity Mars powers abilities

world_rules: Lower gravity on Mars gives Carter superhuman strength and the ability to leap great distances
Green Martians are approximately 15-foot tall, four-armed warriors
Green Martians reproduce via eggs that are incubated communally
Martian society among the Tharks is harsh and warlike, with little room for sentiment
